I8000H Additional Active Diagnoses: ICD 8 Code CHAR 8 This column contains ICD (International Classification of Diseases) code 8 for an additional active diagnoses in the last seven days.
331 I8000I_ICD_9_CD I8000I_ICD_9_CD I8000I Additional Active Diagnoses: ICD 9 Code CHAR 8 This column contains ICD (International Classification of Diseases) code 9 for an additional active diagnoses in the last seven days.
332 I8000J_ICD_10_CD I8000J_ICD_10_CD I8000J Additional Active Diagnoses: ICD 10 Code
